qa_pairs.question: What is the status of the compute nodes described for the Béluga cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: As of July 31, 2025, all the compute nodes listed for the Béluga cluster are closed.

qa_pairs.question: What operational feature is activated on all compute nodes of the Béluga cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Turbo mode is activated on all compute nodes of Béluga.

qa_pairs.question: What CPU model is consistently used across all compute node configurations listed for the Béluga cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: All listed compute nodes in the Béluga cluster utilize 2 x Intel Gold 6148 Skylake @ 2.4 GHz CPUs.
